page: Microsoft Azure EC4ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECADSv5 server family. Powered by an x86_64 AMD processor, this instance features 4 dedicated virtual CPUs and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

For storage requirements, the EC4ads_v5 includes 154 GB of local disk space and is fully capable of utilizing Premium Storage. The instance does not bundle any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. It does not feature any graphics processing units, making it strictly a CPU-driven resource.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation combined with a high memory-to-vCPU ratio provides a dense resource profile suitable for memory-intensive workloads without the overhead of larger instance classes. This hardware configuration is well-suited for relational database servers, in-memory caching layers, and data processing applications that require a larger memory footprint relative to compute cores.
description: Microsoft Azure EC4ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECADSv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 AMD processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 154 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it does not bundle any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU hardware. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications, offering qualitative cost efficiency by balancing dedicated compute resources with a substantial memory allocation. The EC4ads_v5 is suited for workloads such as relational databases, mid-sized in-memory caches, and structured data processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC4ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and 154 GB of local storage, designed for database and memory-intensive workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors, substantial RAM-to-core density, and fast local storage for data-intensive workloads.
